The '''Ebruchi''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] race native to the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]]. They were [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] with creamy white skin and mouths that were surrounded by worm-shaped tentacles. The Ebruchi were a [[Unidentified Ebruchi clan|clan—based]] civilization that dwelled in the unknown [[Realspace/Legends|space]] where their held territory over a handful of [[Star system/Legends|star systems]], and prowled the edges of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] and [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]], looking for prey that wandered. The Ebruchi were mainly composed of Ebruchi, but were known to accept others into their ranks, usually outcasts from the various [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Species/Legends|species]] found in the Unknown Regions.

==History==
[[File:Thrawn_Meeting.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The Galactic Empire made contact with the Ebruchi clan.]]
They were ruthless [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] whose [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] was not known and whose history was devoted to conquest. While they were seen as war-like, the Ebruchi themselves tended to use small [[Starship/Legends|starships]] for travel rather than large [[Fleet/Legends|fleets]] of bigger ships. Many believed that the race were barbaric nomads who had traveled in [[Realspace/Legends|space]] for so long that they had forgotten, as well as forsaken, their planetary heritage.

[[Speciesism]] was a foreign concept to the Ebruchi. Members of other races made up parts of the pirate crews of the Ebruchi fleet and were considered Ebruchi as well. The most notable of these races were the [[Eickarie]], [[Morseerian/Legends|Morseerian]], and [[Tarro]].
